chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-3719 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objections 2. For order on Misc. No.19324/2023 (Exemption) 3. For hearing of main case 04.9.2025 None present for the petitioner -------------------------------- This is an old petition of 2023, which is over two years ago. On the last date of hearing i.e. 04.9.2023, none was present for the petitioner without intimation. In fact the petitioner has never appeared before this Court since initiating this petition. Despite lapse of two years, the petitioner has taken no steps to diligently pursue this petition. Once again today, learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution alongwith listed application. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
